decks.notes: This deck aims to win quickly through a combo using Doomsday and Thassa's Oracle, with efficient card selection and protection from counter spells like Force of Will and Daze. The deck includes ways to filter through the deck rapidly such as Brainstorm and Ponder, as well as mana acceleration with Lotus Petal and Dark Ritual. The Fantasticar serves as a key piece in the combo, allowing for additional card draw and manipulation to set up the win condition effectively. The deck focuses on speed and precision to achieve victory in Legacy 1 vs 1 matchups.

The main concept of this deck is to use a combination of disruptive spells and efficient creatures to control the tempo of the game. By utilizing cards like Daze, Fatal Push, and Thoughtseize to disrupt the opponent's game plan, while deploying threats like Kaito, Bane of Nightmares, Murktide Regent, and Nethergoyf to apply pressure and close out the game quickly. The deck also includes card advantage engines like Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student and Brainstorm to maintain a steady stream of resources. Additionally, the mana denial strategy with Wasteland and efficient land base helps to further disrupt the opponent's plans.

The deck focuses on quickly getting powerful, game-winning creatures onto the battlefield by utilizing the "Show and Tell" card. By using cards like Omniscience, Emrakul, the Aeons Torn, and Atraxa, Grand Unifier, the goal is to overwhelm the opponent with big threats that they cannot easily deal with. The deck also contains counterspells like Force of Will and Spell Pierce to protect the combo and disrupt the opponent's plans. Additionally, acceleration cards like Lotus Petal and Simian Spirit Guide help to speed up the deck's game plan.

This Dimir Tempo deck focuses on disrupting the opponent with countermagic while applying pressure with efficient threats like Orcish Bowmasters and Nethergoyf. The deck utilizes a mix of disruption, card advantage, and versatile threats to control the tempo of the game and outmaneuver the opponent. With a combination of disruptive spells like Force of Will and Daze, along with powerful threats like Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student and Murktide Regent, this deck aims to disrupt the opponent's game plan while presenting a clock that they must answer.

The deck focuses on utilizing Cloudpost and Tron lands to ramp up mana quickly and cast powerful spells and creatures. It includes a mix of control elements such as counterspells like Force of Will and Force of Negation, along with removal spells like Dismember and Eldrazi Confluence. The key strategy is to control the board while ramping up mana to cast high-impact threats like Ugin, the Spirit Dragon and Karn, the Great Creator. With versatile cards like Stock Up and Waterlogged Teachings, the deck aims to out-value opponents and win through powerful late-game plays.

The key concept of this deck is to disrupt the opponent's game plan while applying pressure with aggressive creatures and efficient removal spells. The deck aims to control the board with cards like Thoughtseize, Force of Will, and Daze, while also using cards like Nethergoyf and Brazen Borrower to close out the game quickly. By combining tempo plays with card advantage and efficient threats, the deck can quickly overwhelm opponents and secure victories in a Legacy 1 vs 1 format.

The key concept of this Doomsday combo deck is to assemble the necessary cards to cast Doomsday and utilize it to manipulate the order of the top five cards of the library to win the game with Thassa's Oracle. The deck includes various ways to search for combo pieces, protect the combo with Force of Will and Daze, and generate mana quickly with Dark Ritual and Lotus Petal. The goal is to efficiently and effectively set up the win condition while disrupting the opponent's game plan.

This deck focuses on using ramp and control elements to quickly generate a large amount of mana by assembling the Cloudpost/Tron lands. This allows for playing powerful high-cost spells and activating abilities. The deck also includes a strong selection of counterspells and removal to control the board and protect its key pieces. The end goal is to overwhelm the opponent with efficient threats and disruption, while leveraging the mana advantage provided by the Cloudpost/Tron lands to dominate the game.

This Eldrazi Aggro deck focuses on deploying powerful Eldrazi creatures quickly and disrupting the opponent's game plan with cards like Thorn of Amethyst and Chalice of the Void. The deck also aims to accelerate its mana using cards like Lotus Petal and Ancient Tomb, allowing it to cast large Eldrazi threats like Reality Smasher and Thought-Knot Seer ahead of schedule. With a combination of aggressive creatures and disruptive spells, this deck aims to overwhelm the opponent and close out the game quickly.

The deck focuses on assembling various combo pieces to generate a large amount of mana quickly and cast powerful spells such as Ad Nauseam and Tendrils of Agony. It utilizes cards like Lotus Petal, Lion's Eye Diamond, and Dark Ritual to accelerate its game plan, while also running disruptive cards like Thoughtseize and Duress to disrupt the opponent's strategy. The deck also includes ways to tutor for key pieces using cards like Infernal Tutor and Wishclaw Talisman. The goal is to chain together spells to create a lethal storm combo and win the game in a single turn.

This Boros Aggro deck focuses on utilizing aggressive creatures like Amped Raptor and Ocelot Pride, backed up by cards like Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Guide of Souls for additional support and pressure on opponents. Thalia, Guardian of Thraben and Static Prison help to disrupt opponents' strategies, while Goblin Bombardment provides a direct damage option. The deck also includes disruption with cards like Swords to Plowshares and Karakas, along with mana denial through Wasteland. Overall, the deck aims to apply early pressure and control the game to secure a victory.

The key concept of this Legacy 1 vs 1 Combo deck centered around utilizing The Fantasticar as a key combo piece to generate significant advantage and win conditions. By playing powerful cards like Quantum Riddler and Flow State, along with efficient card selection and disruption spells like Thoughtseize and Brainstorm, the deck aims to assemble its combo pieces quickly and overwhelm opponents with its synergy and efficiency. The inclusion of Dark Ritual and Force of Will provide additional acceleration and protection, making the deck a formidable force in the Legacy format.

The main focus of this Lands Control deck is to create a strong lockdown on the opponent's resources while leveraging the powerful synergy between lands like Dark Depths, Thespian's Stage, and Life from the Loam. By utilizing cards like Wasteland and Ghost Quarter to disrupt the opponent's mana base, along with spells like Erode and Malevolent Rumble to control the board, this deck aims to grind out the game and outvalue the opponent over time. Additionally, cards like Exploration and Crop Rotation provide additional flexibility in ramping up your own resource base.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly reanimate powerful creatures like Archon of Cruelty and Griselbrand using cards like Reanimate and Animate Dead. By utilizing cards like Thoughtseize and Force of Will to disrupt the opponent's game plan, the deck aims to assemble its combo pieces and win the game through explosive plays. Otherworldly Gaze and Flow State provide additional card selection and protection, while Atraxa, Grand Unifier can help to generate advantage and shut down opposing strategies. Overall, the deck aims to win through fast and efficient reanimation combos.

The main idea of this deck is to disrupt the opponent's strategy with cards like Thoughtseize and Daze, while also applying pressure with aggressive creatures like Murktide Regent and Kaito, Bane of Nightmares. The deck aims to control the tempo of the game using cards like Flow State and Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student, while also utilizing cards like Force of Will and Fatal Push for removal. The deck also includes land disruption with Wasteland and Undercity Sewers to further disrupt the opponent's game plan. Overall, the deck's strategy is to maintain control while applying consistent pressure to win the game.

The deck focuses on quickly disrupting the opponent's strategy and controlling the board through counter spells and removal, while putting pressure on them with efficient threats like Barrowgoyf and Nethergoyf. It aims to maintain tempo by using cards like Daze and Brazen Borrower to keep the opponent off balance, all while utilizing powerful cards like Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student and Kaito, Bane of Nightmares to gain card advantage and close out the game quickly. The deck's strategy is to be aggressive and proactive, while also disrupting the opponent's plans to secure victory.
